---
image: lv.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: "{{< fa brands bluesky >}} Bluesky"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/lucasvoirin.bsky.social
    - text: "{{< fa brands github >}} Github"
      href: https://github.com/lucasvoirin
    - text: "{{< fa leaf >}} Center for Forest Research"
      href: https://www.cef-cfr.ca/pmwiki.php?n=Membres.LucasVoirin
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid>}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2077-2281
---

## Lucas Voirin

{{< fa building-columns >}} [Université Laval](https://www.ulaval.ca/)

{{< fa location-dot >}} Quebec, Canada

I'm a PhD student in forest sciences at the [Center for Forest Research](https://www.cef-cfr.ca/).

My work focuses on the integration of wildlife considerations into natural resources development projects.
